reference: No, this does not appear to be a serious problem if your electrocardiogram was normal. I am not sure why he told you that there is tightness in your heart muscle, as heart muscles do not get this condition. Maybe you were told there is tightness of chest muscles, which is the most common cause of chest pain and breathing problems without any cardiac issue.
text: No, this does not appear to be a problem if your electrocardiogram was normal. I am not sure why he told you that there is tightness in your heart muscle. As heart muscles do not get this condition, maybe you were told there is tightness of chest muscles, which is the most common cause of chest pain and breathing problems with any cardiac issue.
